displayName: MEXAS Composite (Modular Expandable Armor System, IBD Deisenroth)
notes: MEXAS (Modular Expandable Armor System) by IBD Deisenroth. Ceramic tile (Al2O3/SiC) strike face + polymer/rubber matrix backing. Areal density ~65-75 kg/m² at 30mm module thickness. RHAe ~1.5-2.0 per module mm vs KE, higher vs shaped charges (~2.5-3.0). Used as bolt-on applique on Stryker, M113, CV90, Leopard 2. Multi-hit capability limited by ceramic fracture. SpallCoeff moderate: ceramic face produces fragments but backing catches most.
